title: Registration, invitations and guests
description: Design versioned registration forms, review submissions, invite audiences, manage guests and apply privacy retention controls.

load_error.title: Registration workspace could not be loaded
load_error.description: Check your connection and permissions, then try again.

privacy.title: Privacy controls are enforced
privacy.description: Answer access is purpose-recorded and audited. Sensitive answers are excluded unless you explicitly request them and have permission.

settings.title: Registration policy
settings.description: Configure approval, registration windows, cancellation timing, member limits, guests and privacy retention before building the form.
settings.window_hint: Leave both registration dates blank for no time window.

forms.title: Registration forms
forms.empty: No registration forms have been created.
forms.settings_missing_description: Save the event registration settings before creating a form.

editor.name: Form name
editor.rules_description: Published versions are immutable. Each question records its purpose, classification, retention period and any conditional display rule.
editor.question: Question {{number}}
editor.choices_description: Enter one choice per line. At least two are required.
editor.displayed_text: Consent or waiver text shown to attendees

submissions.title: Registration submissions
submissions.description: Review effective and superseded attempts without exposing answers in the roster.
submissions.audit_description: Record a specific operational purpose and correlation reference before opening answers.
submissions.export_description: The export is limited, formula-safe and recorded in the immutable answer-access audit.

invitations.builder_description: Preview and freeze the recipient snapshot before scheduling or sending.
invitations.snapshot_notice: This exact valid-recipient snapshot will be used at send time, even if group membership later changes.
invitations.empty: No invitation campaigns have been created.

member.label: Member IDs
member.description: Enter member IDs separated by commas, spaces or new lines.

email.label: Email addresses
email.description: Enter one or more addresses separated by commas or new lines.

group.label: Group ID
group.description: Enter the group whose current active members should be snapshotted.

audience.label: Optional member roles
audience.description: Leave blank for all active members, or enter allow-listed roles separated by commas.

csv.label: CSV data
csv.description: Paste CSV with an email column. Invalid and duplicate rows are reported before send.

guests.cancel_confirm_body: The place held for {{name}} will be released. This cannot be undone from this screen.
guests.title: Guest roster and attendance
guests.description: Guest identity and contact details are shown only when your event permissions allow them.

retention.warning_description: Always review the dry run. Applying it removes expired answer and guest identity ciphertext while preserving consent and audit evidence.
retention.title: Privacy retention run
retention.description: Preview records due for anonymisation at a specific UTC date before applying the same frozen run.

messages.form_save_error: Registration form could not be saved.
messages.form_publish_error: Registration form could not be published.
messages.form_forked: A new editable form version was created.
messages.form_fork_error: A new form version could not be created.
messages.export_error: Registration export could not be prepared.
messages.issue_error: Invitation campaign could not be issued.
messages.schedule_error: Invitation campaign could not be scheduled.
messages.cancel_error: Invitation campaign could not be cancelled.
messages.attendance_error: Guest attendance could not be updated.
messages.retention_preview_error: Retention preview could not be created.
messages.retention_apply_error: Retention anonymisation could not be applied.
messages.amendment_error: An amendment could not be created.
messages.settings_save_error: Registration policy could not be saved. Check the dates and limits.
messages.settings_publish_error: Registration policy could not be published.

accessible.privacy_consent_label: I confirm that I have the guest's permission to provide these details.
accessible.privacy_consent_text: The guest agreed that their identity and contact details may be stored for event administration and removed after the stated retention period.
accessible.notification_consent_label: The guest agrees to receive messages about this event.
accessible.notification_consent_text: The guest agreed to receive necessary event updates at the email address provided.
accessible.source_hint: Use the format described for the selected audience source.
accessible.schedule_or_send: Schedule or send this frozen preview
accessible.retention_as_of_hint: Choose a date after the event has ended.
accessible.form_slots_hint: Complete the enabled question rows. Blank rows are ignored.
accessible.validation_error: Check the information you entered and try again.
